base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_intro_screen — a ui (hud_readout) from 1985 super mario bros. Pre-level intro screen — black background with 'MARIO × \[lives\]' centered + 'WORLD \[X\]-\[Y\]' below + small Mario sprite. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pre-level intro screen — black background with 'MARIO × \[lives\]' centered + 'WORLD \[X\]-\[Y\]' below + small Mario sprite; displays for ~3 seconds before level start
